text: Living a healthy life means taking care of both your body and mind. A balanced diet with fruits, vegetables, and protein gives you energy. Regular exercise, like walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, keeps your heart strong and improves your mood. Equally important is getting enough sleep—aim for 7 to 9 hours each night to help your body recover. Don't forget mental health; take breaks to relax or do activities you enjoy. Finally, work-life balance is key. Try not to overwork, and make time for friends, hobbies, and rest. Small daily habits make a big difference for long-term health.
